title: Manappuram Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Manappuram Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Manappuram Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Manappuram Finance:
Manappuram Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manappuram Finance!
